utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all 6 categories. Each category is fully specified with detailed information: property (details, type, size, price, features, fees, neighborhood), financing (terms, amounts, interest, fees, timeline), legal_services (provider, cost, currency, status), moving_services (level, cost, currency, status), setup_services (utility_setup and property_survey both with costs, currency, and status), and total_budget (complete breakdown including all costs and currency). All items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchased property described as a '3-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo' priced at CAD 780,000 in East End Toronto. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match by price and description is the 'Historic Townhouse' (CAD 750K, rating 6), as it features similar budget range and property scale, while all other properties are either significantly cheaper or far more expensive. For financing, the assistant used a traditional mortgage with a 2.8% rate and CAD 800 processing fee, which aligns with the 'First-Time Buyer' option (arrangement fee CAD 800, rating 10). For legal services, the 'Premium legal services' at CAD 1200 matches 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). For moving, 'standard with packing included' costing CAD 650 matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 8). For utility setup, 'premium utility package' costing CAD 280 aligns with 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). For property survey at CAD 650, it corresponds to 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9).
